field.name: Via
field.value: ASCII formatted according to intermediary format

field.name: Payload
field.value: Entity-body data or an empty field

field.name: HeaderField
field.value: ASCII string including header name, colon, value, and CRLF

field.name: Body
field.value: Data related to the error message

field.name: Upgrade
field.value: List of protocol names and optional versions

field.name: Body
field.value: Depends on request or response needs

field.name: ContentType
field.value: MIME type as per RFC 2045 and RFC 2046

field.name: Date
field.value: HTTP-date format as defined in RFC5322 Section 3.3

field.name: Server
field.value: product identifier followed by optional comments

field.name: Body
field.value: text/plain or as specified by Content-Type

field.name: Header
field.value: ASCII printable characters excluding CR, LF
